
```{r}
set.seed(1)
pacman::p_load(cmdstanr, tidyverse, cowplot)
theme_set(theme_cowplot())
```

```{r}
agent.PBA <- Vectorize(function(
    alpha_prior,
    beta_prior,
    own_rating,
    external_rating,
    own_weighting,
    external_weighting
) {
    alpha_post <- alpha_prior + own_weighting * (own_rating - 1) + (1 - own_weighting) * (external_rating - 1)
    beta_post  <- beta_prior  + own_weighting * (8 - own_rating) + (1 - own_weighting) * (8 - external_rating)
    
    1 + sum(rbinom(1, size = 7, prob = rbeta(1, alpha_post, beta_post)))
})

agent.WBA <- Vectorize(function(
    alpha_prior,
    beta_prior,
    own_rating,
    external_rating,
    own_weighting,
    external_weighting
) {
    alpha_post <- alpha_prior + own_weighting * (own_rating - 1) + external_weighting * (external_rating - 1)
    beta_post  <- beta_prior  + own_weighting * (8 - own_rating) + external_weighting * (8 - external_rating)
    
    1 + sum(rbinom(1, size = 7, prob = rbeta(1, alpha_post, beta_post)))
})

simulate <- function(
    agent_evaluator,
    n_observations,
    alpha_prior,
    beta_prior,
    own_rating,
    external_rating,
    own_weighting,
    external_weighting
) {
  tibble(
    FaceID=seq(1, n_observations),
    FirstRating=round(runif(n_observations, 1, 8)),
    GroupRating=round(runif(n_observations, 1, 8)),
  ) |> mutate(
    SecondRating=agent_evaluator(
        alpha_prior=alpha_prior,
        beta_prior=beta_prior,
        own_rating=FirstRating,
        external_rating=GroupRating,
        own_weighting=own_weighting,
        external_weighting=external_weighting
    ),
  )
}

simulation <- simulate(
  agent_evaluator=agent.PBA,
  n_observations=100,
  alpha_prior=4,
  beta_prior=3,
  own_weighting=0.5,
  external_weighting=NA
) |> mutate(
    Feedback=GroupRating-FirstRating,
    Change=SecondRating-FirstRating,
    AbsChange=abs(SecondRating-FirstRating)
)

simulation
```


```{r}
ggplot(simulation) +
  geom_jitter(aes(x=Feedback, y=Change), width=0.2, height=0.2, shape=1)
```


```{r fig.width = 10}
simulation |> head(20) |>  ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x=FaceID, y=FirstRating, yend=SecondRating), 
    arrow=arrow(type="closed", length = unit(0.4, "cm"))
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x=FaceID, y=FirstRating), 
    color="black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x=FaceID, y=GroupRating),
    color="red"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(1, 8)) +
  labs(y="Rating")
```





```{r}
simulation |> pivot_longer(
  cols=c(FirstRating, GroupRating, SecondRating),
  names_to="Observation",
  values_to="Rating",
) |> ggplot(aes(x=Rating)) +
  geom_bar() +
  stat_summary(aes(xintercept = after_stat(x), y = 0), fun = mean, geom = "vline", orientation = "y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(1, 8)) +
  facet_wrap(~Observation) +
  labs(y="Observation count")

simulation |> pivot_longer(
  cols=c(Feedback, Change, AbsChange),
  names_to="Observation",
  values_to="Offset",
) |> ggplot(aes(x=Offset)) +
  geom_bar() +
  stat_summary(aes(xintercept = after_stat(x), y = 0), fun = mean, geom = "vline", orientation = "y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-7, 7), limits=c(-7, 7)) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(Observation, c("Feedback", "Change", "AbsChange"))) +
  labs(y="Observation count")
```

```{r}

## Setting up agent types

agents_wba <- tibble(
  AgentType    = c("Self-Focused", "Balanced", "Socially-Influenced"),
  own_weighting = c(1.5, 1.0, 0.5),
  external_weighting = c(0.5, 1.0, 2.0)
)

agents_pba <- tibble(
  AgentType    = c("Self-Focused", "Balanced", "Socially-Influenced"),
  own_weighting = c(1.5, 1.0, 0.5),
  external_weighting = NA
)

## Global params 
n_observations <- 100
alpha_prior    <- 4
beta_prior     <- 3

## adding columns to identify agent type and ModelType in the results
run_sim <- function(agent_evaluator, own_weighting, external_weighting, AgentType, ModelType) {
  simulate(
    agent_evaluator    = agent_evaluator,
    n_observations     = n_observations,
    alpha_prior        = alpha_prior,
    beta_prior         = beta_prior,
    own_weighting      = own_weighting,
    external_weighting = external_weighting
  ) |> mutate(
    Feedback   = GroupRating - FirstRating,
    Change     = SecondRating - FirstRating,
    AbsChange  = abs(SecondRating - FirstRating),
    AgentType = AgentType,
    ModelType = ModelType
  )
}

## run for pba typologies
results_pba <- agents_pba |>
  pmap(function(AgentType, own_weighting, external_weighting) {
    run_sim(agent.PBA, own_weighting, external_weighting, AgentType, ModelType = "PBA")
  }) |>
  list_rbind() |> drop_na(SecondRating)

## run for wba typologies
results_wba <- agents_wba |>
  pmap(function(AgentType, own_weighting, external_weighting) {
    run_sim(agent.WBA, own_weighting, external_weighting, AgentType, ModelType = "WBA")
  }) |>
  list_rbind()|> drop_na(SecondRating)

## combine
results_all <- bind_rows(results_pba, results_wba)

```


```{r}

## Plot the combined results for each ModelType and AgentType

for (m in unique(results_all$ModelType)) {
  p <- results_all |>
    filter(ModelType == m) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = SecondRating, fill = AgentType)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, position = "dodge", colour = "white") +
    facet_wrap(~ AgentType, labeller = label_both) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
    labs(title    = paste("Distribution of Second Ratings —", m),
      x = "Second Rating",
      y = "Count",
      fill = "Agent Type") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  print(p)
}

```

```{r}
model <- cmdstan_model("./stan/PBA.stan", cpp_options=list(stan_threads=FALSE))

model_fits <- list()

for (type in unique(results_pba$AgentType)) {
  agent_observations <- subset(results_pba, AgentType == type)
  
  model_fit <- model$sample(
    data = list(
      N=nrow(agent_observations),
      FirstRating=agent_observations$FirstRating,
      GroupRating=agent_observations$GroupRating,
      SecondRating=agent_observations$SecondRating
    ),
    seed = 0,
    chains = 4,
    iter_sampling = 1000,
    iter_warmup = 1000,
    refresh = 0
  )
  model_fits[[type]] <- model_fit 
}

```

```{r}
model_fits[["Balanced"]]
```


```{r}

## Testing on real data 

cogsci_pre <- read_csv("./data/cogsci_clean.csv")


## Remove rows in FirstRating, GroupRating and SecondRating that are = 0 

cogsci_pre <- cogsci_pre |> filter(FirstRating != 0, GroupRating != 0, SecondRating != 0)


## Running the model on experimental data 

model <- cmdstan_model("./stan/PBA.stan", cpp_options=list(stan_threads=FALSE)) ## PBA

model_fit <- model$sample(
  data = list(
    N=nrow(cogsci_pre),
    FirstRating=cogsci_pre$FirstRating,
    GroupRating=cogsci_pre$GroupRating,
    SecondRating=cogsci_pre$SecondRating
  ),
  seed = 0,
  chains = 4,
  iter_sampling = 2000,
  iter_warmup = 1000,
  refresh = 0
)


```

```{r}

model_fit$print(max_rows = 20)


```
